infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Your location is used to confirm you are patrolling your assigned zone.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Background location lets command confirm you remain in your assigned zone for the duration of your patrol.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The camera is used to capture a GPS-stamped photo for your field report.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Background location lets command confirm you remain in your assigned zone during patrol.
